name: Fact extraction — price, hours, accessibility
prompt: Find the entry price, opening hours and wheelchair accessibility of Plage de Saint-Jorioz using https://loisirs74.fr. Return them as three labeled facts. This is a read-only research task: browse and read pages only, never submit forms or make bookings.

judge.check: Found the entry price 2,60 € (adult, paid season)
Used loisirs74.fr pages as the source, not general knowledge
Reached the answer in few steps without dead ends or 404s
